column1: # Source of truth — hw_db/build_cpu_db.py regenerates src/detect/cpu_db.c.
#   vendor        CPUID vendor string (cpuid match only; empty for legacy)
#   family        CPU family (cpuid match only; decimal)
#   model         CPU model (cpuid match only; decimal)
#   legacy_class  class token (legacy match only; empty for cpuid)
#   friendly      Human-readable name — what gets shown to the user
#   iters_low     bench_cpu expected iters_per_sec LOW bound (0 = no data)
#   iters_high    bench_cpu expected iters_per_sec HIGH bound (0 = no data)
